items.title: With the SCORE Act dying on the vine, there's another ballyhooed bill that will try to legislate laws around the NCAA. Here's the PDF of the Protect College Sports Act, a new bill introduced by Republican Sen. Ted Cruz and Democratic Sen. Maria Cantwell.
items.author: Matt Norlander
items.body_excerpt:
With the SCORE Act dying on the vine, there's another ballyhooed bill that will try to legislate laws around the NCAA. Here's the PDF of the Protect College Sports Act, a new bill introduced by Republican Sen. Ted Cruz and Democratic Sen. Maria Cantwell.

Don't hold your breath on this becoming law.
